mapper.sql: select id, elder_id, check_in_id, leave_type, start_time, expected_return_time, actual_return_time, leave_days, emergency_contact, emergency_phone, reason, status, approver, approve_time, remark, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by from leave_record
mapper.select: select lr.id, lr.elder_id, lr.check_in_id, lr.leave_type, lr.start_time, lr.expected_return_time, lr.actual_return_time, lr.leave_days, lr.emergency_contact, lr.emergency_phone, lr.reason, lr.status, lr.approver, lr.approve_time, e.name as elder_name, b.bed_number from leave_record lr left join elder e on lr.elder_id = e.id left join check_in ci on lr.check_in_id = ci.id left join check_in_cost cic on ci.id = cic.check_in_id left join bed b on cic.bed_id = b.id where lr.id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
insert into leave_record
elder_id, check_in_id, leave_type, start_time, expected_return_time, actual_return_time, leave_days, emergency_contact, emergency_phone, reason, status, approver, approve_time, remark, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by,
#{elderId}, #{checkInId}, #{leaveType}, #{startTime}, #{expectedReturnTime}, #{actualReturnTime}, #{leaveDays}, #{emergencyContact}, #{emergencyPhone}, #{reason}, #{status}, #{approver}, #{approveTime}, #{remark}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createBy}, #{updateBy},
mapper.delete:
delete from leave_record where id in
#{id}
